texto: It is only when one knows the unutterability of the name of God that one can utter the name of Jesus Christ
autor: it is only when one loves life and the earth so much that without them everything seems to be over that one may believe in the resurrection and a new world
explicacao: Citação de it is only when one loves life and the earth so much that without them everything seems to be over that one may believe in the resurrection and a new world sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “It is only when one knows the unutterability of the name of God that one can utter the name of Je…” articula motivacao, inspiracional, reflexao em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e reflexao.
